app.name: Personance
app.tagline: Stay in touch with what matters.

contacts.title: Reminders
contacts.empty: Nothing here yet. Tap + to add a person, thing, or activity you want to keep up with.
contacts.name: Name

settings.title: Settings
settings.availableDaysDescription: Choose the weekdays on which you'd like to receive reminders.
settings.availableHoursDescription: Choose the hours during which you'd like to receive reminders.
settings.surpriseDescription: Show the target date (distance + ±5 days). Tap the date on a card to reveal the exact reminder date.
settings.updateDescription: A newer version is ready to install.
settings.updateCheckDescription: Clear all cached data and reload the app to fetch the latest assets.
settings.notificationsDescription: Get notified when it's time to follow up on something.
settings.notificationsOn: Active — notifications work while the browser is open.
settings.notificationsOnPush: Push active — arrives even when the browser is closed.
settings.notificationsOff: Push is off. Tap enable to turn it back on.
settings.notificationsDenied: Notifications are blocked in your browser settings.
settings.notificationsUnsupported: Notifications are not supported on this device.
settings.pwaDescription: Personance is a PWA. Add it to your home screen for a faster, offline-ready experience.
settings.pwaManualText: If you don't see a button, use your browser's "Add to Home Screen" option.
settings.pwaInstalledText: Personance is already saved on this device.

intro.title: Welcome to Personance
intro.subtitle: Stay in touch with what matters.
intro.whatText: Personance is a gentle reminder system for the people, things, and activities you care about. Life gets busy — Personance makes sure nothing important fades away.
intro.howText: Add anything you want to keep up with — a friend, a hobby, a habit. Set a distance (how many days between reminders) and an uncertainty (a bit of randomness so it feels natural, not robotic). Personance picks the right moment to nudge you.
intro.privacyText: Everything is stored locally on your device. No accounts, no servers, no tracking.
intro.pwaText: Personance is a PWA. Add it to your home screen so it stays handy and works offline.
